title: RNA isolation protocol from unwilling plant tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cvsdj","text":"This protocol is intended for HIGH quality RNA extraction from plan tissues ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39d7u","text":"We used this protocol after several attempts with Trizol, Qiagen RNeasy plant kit and other protocols with no ressults.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"agpv4","text":"This procedure redered us between 300 to 1000 ng with good RNA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

 0.5g/L spermidine

 2% [B-mercaptoethanol] (add just before )","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18},{"style":"italic","offset":173,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dupju","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ebej","text":"Ethanol 100%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ecd6a","text":"LiCl2 10M","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dgv4o","text":"Chloroform:IAA 24:1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5brfs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8dvig","text":"1.5 mL tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9p02m","text":"2 mL tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3r924","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6o045","text":"SSTE buffer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"173hm","text":"1M NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ej2j5","text":"0.5% SDS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d2kfg","text":"10mM TrisHCl (pH 8)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"53o88","text":"1mM EDTA (pH 8)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: This protocol is an adaptation of https://doi.org/10.1007/BF02670468 designed for extraction of RNA from pine needles with high polyphenolic compounds or high sugar content. For all buffers use DEPC treated water or Nuclease free ddH2O

Extraction buffer: 2% CTAB (hexadecyltrimethylammonium bromide) 2% PVP (polyvinylpyrrolidinone K 30) 100 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0) 25 mM EDTA 2.0 M NaC1 0.5g/L spermidine (mix and autoclave) Alt. microweave heat 2% [B-mercaptoethanol] (add just before ) Ethanol 100% LiCl2 10M Chloroform:IAA 24:1 1.5 mL tubes 2 mL tubes SSTE buffer: 1M NaCl 0.5% SDS 10mM TrisHCl (pH 8) 1mM EDTA (pH 8)

For 200 mg sample use 3 mL of extraction buffer. Grind the sample with liquid nitrogen until to a fine powder. Add the 3 ml of Extraction buffer, the frozen paste will become softener in time, use the cold paste to finish grinding any remanent plant tissue. Separate the mixture in 3 separated 2mL tubes Keep the tubes on ice On ice

Add an equal volumen of ChCl:IAA and vortex x 30 sec Room temperature Extract the WHOLE aquose phase, do not leave any of it from each tube. ignore any coloration of the aqueus phase *Optional : Gycogen can be added at this point Transfer the phase to 1.5 ml tubes and add 1/4 volume of 10M LiCl and mix by inverting
13000 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes Centrifuge 10m at 13000 at RT, discard the liquid, mind the pellet!

*If the SSTE buffer is below 25°C SDS on it will form flecks, warm untl sds is completely dissolved Dissolve the pellet with 500 µL of SSTE buffer. Join the pellet from the 3 initial tubes using the same 500 ul of SSTE.
Precipitate overnight at 4°C 4 °C Phases can be formed due to cold SDS in the buffers, ignore every phase or precipitation and go on.
Extract with an equal volumen of CHCl:IAA by vortexing for 30 sec 13000 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes Centrifuge at 13000 rpm x 10m at RT

Recover the upper phase completely, do not leave ANY traces, a white smudge between the phases must be retrieved. dont worry if SOME chcl2 is tranfered. Add 2 volumes of cold ETOH100% and precipitate for at least 02:00:00 at -20 °C
After precipitation centrifuge at 13000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes Discard the ethanol, DRY the rna pellet (might be invisible!) Resuspend the pellet on 30-50 µL of ddH2O nuclease free or TE buffer
creator: Samuel Parra
